eas_text: A civil authority has issued A BLUE ALERT for the following counties or areas: California; at 10:56 PM on SEP 4, 2019 Effective until 11:56 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
A BLUE ALERT IS BEING ISSUED BY THE CALIFORNIA HIGHWAY PATROL ON BEHALF OF THE MERCED COUNTY SHERIFFS DEPARTMENT.

THE MERCED COUNTY SHERIFFS DEPARTMENT WAS INVOLVED IN A SHOOTING WITH GUADALUPE HERRERA LOPEZ.  HERRERA LOPEZ HAS BEEN DESCRIBED AS A HISPANIC MALE, 5 FOOT 7 INCHES TALL, WEIGHING 160 POUNDS WITH BROWN EYES AND LONG BROWN HAIR AND MUSTACHE.  HERRERA LOPEZ WAS LAST SEEN WEARING A BLACK SHIRT AND DARK JEANS.  HERRERA LOPEZ IS CONSIDERED ARMED AND DANGEROUS AND MAY BE IN POSSESSION OF A SEMI AUTOMATIC HANDGUN. 

HERRERA LOPEZ IS DRIVING A 2013 WHITE GMC SIERRA CREW CAB PICKUP, CALIFORNIA LICENSE PLATE 2 5 5 9 9 H 1.

HERRERA LOPEZ IS ARMED AND DANGEROUS AND ALL OFFICER SAFETY PROTOCOLS SHOULD BE USED IF LOCATED.
IF SEEN CALL 9 1 1
